info.title: BillForge API
info.description:
BillForge - Modern Invoice Processing Platform API

## Overview

BillForge is a comprehensive accounts payable automation platform that helps businesses:
- Capture and digitize invoices with OCR
- Route invoices through customizable approval workflows
- Manage vendor relationships
- Generate financial reports and analytics

## Authentication

All API endpoints (except /health) require authentication using JWT Bearer tokens.

1. Obtain tokens via POST /api/v1/auth/login
2. Include the access token in the Authorization header: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`
3. Refresh tokens before expiry using POST /api/v1/auth/refresh

## Multi-Tenancy

BillForge is a multi-tenant system. Include tenant_id in authentication requests.

get.summary: Handle approve action from email - renders confirmation interstitial (GET)
Handle hold action from email - renders confirmation interstitial (GET)
Handle reject action from email - renders confirmation interstitial (GET)
Handle view action from email (redirects to invoice detail page)

post.summary: Connect to Bill.com (save credentials & test connection)

get.summary: List available funding accounts (bank accounts for payment)

post.summary: Push approved BillForge invoice to Bill.com as a bill
POST /billing/checkout - create a Stripe checkout session (or mock checkout)

get.summary: GET /billing/module-addons - return purchasable module add-on catalog

post.summary: POST /billing/quote - price a base plan plus selected module add-ons

get.summary: GET /billing/usage - return per-tenant invoice and vendor counts for the current billing period

post.summary: Upload a document for a specific invoice

get.summary: Check for outbound documents with overdue ack responses
List outbound EDI documents with ack status

post.summary: Run 3-way match: compare an invoice against this PO (and any receiving records)
Send an 820 Payment Remittance Advice for a paid invoice.
post.description:
The invoice must be in "paid" status and have an associated vendor
with a trading partner mapping (edi_trading_partners.vendor_id).

post.summary: Receive inbound EDI documents from middleware webhook
post.description:
This endpoint does NOT use JWT auth. Instead, it verifies the webhook
signature using HMAC-SHA256 with the configured webhook secret.

Flow:
1. Parse payload to extract receiver_id
2. Look up tenant from receiver_id via metadata DB
3. Verify HMAC signature against tenant's stored webhook_secret
4. Store EDI document record (status: processing)
5. For 810 invoices: look up trading partner, map to invoice, create in DB
6. Update EDI document (status: mapped, link invoice_id)

200.description: Mobile login successful or tenant selection required

get.summary: Get single invoice with field selection
Bulk fetch - initial sync or full refresh
Delta sync - fetch changes since last sync

post.summary: Set approver availability (admin or self only)
Get a routing decision for an invoice
Connect to Sage Intacct (save credentials & test connection)
Export invoice to Sage Intacct as AP bill
Sync GL accounts from Sage Intacct
Push invoice payment status back to the linked Salesforce Account.

400.description: Bad request (vendor not mapped, invalid status)

post.summary: Sync Salesforce Accounts as BillForge vendors

get.summary: Get full tenant context with all module and role information
Get the current persona for the authenticated tenant

post.summary: Switch the tenant to a different persona (updates enabled modules)
Export invoice to Workday as supplier invoice

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Skip duplicate detection and force create

200.description: Invoice created with potential duplicate warnings
Invoice uploaded and OCR processing queued

BulkPayItem.description: Individual item in a bulk pay request

DuplicateMatch.description: A single potential duplicate match returned during invoice creation.

DuplicateSignalBreakdown.description: Per-signal breakdown for a duplicate match.

access_token.description: JWT access token for API authentication

refresh_token.description: JWT refresh token for obtaining new access tokens

amount.description: Amount in smallest currency unit (cents for USD)

total_items.description: Total number of items (matches PaginationMeta.total_items on the wire)

funding_account_id.description: Funding account ID (bank account to pay from)

industry.description: Industry vertical for starter pack seeding. Defaults to "generic".

PushBillRequest.description: Push bill request (additional fields for Bill.com bill creation)

chart_of_account_id.description: Chart of account ID for the line

paid_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when payment was made

salesforce_field.description: Salesforce custom field name to update (defaults to `BillForge_Payment_Status__c`)

status.description: Payment status: must be one of `paid`, `partial`, or `void`

invoice_id.description: The BillForge invoice ID that was pushed

salesforce_account_id.description: The Salesforce Account ID that was updated

salesforce_field.description: The Salesforce field that was set

value.description: The value written to the field

failed.description: Number of contacts that failed to sync due to database errors

errors.description: Number of vendors that failed to sync

avg_approvals_per_member.description: Average approvals per team member per day

concentration_percentage.description: Vendor concentration (top 10% of vendors by spend)

workday_account_type.description: Account type (Asset, Liability, Revenue, Expense, Equity)
